author: Disney Channel YouTube
text:
Disney Channel Games 2008 First Full Episode ❤️💛💚💙 | @disneychannel
Watch the Disney Channel Games 2008 first full episode, "Chariot of Champions". The games begin as over 50 Disney Channel stars from around the globe are divided into four teams. In the first event, the teams must build a chariot and race it to the finish. Miley Cyrus performs at the post-games concert!

Watch the next full episode here: https://youtu.be/xvj-fNOVJbo

Available on Disney+
https://www.disneyplus.com/whats-on

Watch the newest Disney Channel videos here: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLiv1IUQDVSNKSwiTLE-l6pwhnu75gRIfH&si=PkfaZLbxEPbza9_U

author: Disney Channel YouTube
text:
🔴 LIVE 24/7! Armorsaurs Full Episodes! 🦖⚡| Dinos and Teen Heroes Save the World | @disneychannel
Watch Armorsaurs full episodes live! Dinosaurs are back, and five teens are the only ones who can bond with them. It’s up to these heroes to armor up and pilot their dinos to fight evil and save the world.

Here Come the Armorsaurs
Teen heroes learn they must bond and armor up with real dinosaurs to protect the Earth. They embark on their first mission to rescue Ajax.

Sister-Sister
Paloma and Prisca’s sisterly argument leads Paloma to hijack a transport for home, only to crash in a river and need rescue from underwater Chromedrones.

Bonded
Joon, the last to bond with a dinosaur, finally makes his match with Velox and together they save the team in an epic canyon battle.

Teamwork Makes the Dream Work
T.J. learns the meaning of teamwork on and off the basketball court as he directs the team through a challenging mission.

Bust the Myth-Ventures
Pilots are led into battle to save Joon from Switchblade, and learn they have to deal with a pair of known vloggers who taped their secret mission.

Brothers in Armorsaurs
Pilots face a massive climactic battle with the biggest Chromedome of all, while revealing hidden truths about the world of Armorsaurs.

Available on Disney XD and Disney+
https://www.disneyplus.com/whats-on/entity-9c9e748e-bcb5-44f1-9970-e5bae57a78bb

Watch the next Armorsaurs video here: https://youtu.be/UJbj0pb6m1E

Watch more Armorsaurs videos here: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLg6R6yXKSLYCgHXKaYIVk5norruDCl-bz

Watch What's New on Disney Channel here: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLg6R6yXKSLYDR_VUUcVIxkjNd_ozPFwAU&si=pU8_gj0gtbPWQRJ8

Dinosaurs are back, and five teens are the only ones who can bond with them. It’s up to these heroes to armor up and pilot their dinos to fight evil and save the world.
